seoTitle: Palm & Light Coffee | Specialty Coffee in San Mateo
seoDescription: Visit Palm & Light Coffee in San Mateo for specialty coffee, seasonal drinks, pastries, and welcoming hospitality inspired by the philosophy of Palm.

hero.description: A sun-filled café in the South Bay, where craft coffee meets calm, greenery, and space to linger.
hero.hours: Monday - Friday 6 am-6pm, Saturday: 6am - 11 pm, Sunday 6am-6pm

story.label: Our Story
story.title: A pursuit of light,
story.p1: At Palm & Light, we believe great coffee begins with how a space feels. Light, air, and intention shape everything—from the first pour to the last sip.
story.p2: Our café is designed as a place to slow down. Sunlight moves through the room, greenery softens the edges, and every detail is considered but never overstated.
story.p3: We approach coffee with quiet precision—sourcing thoughtfully, preparing simply, and letting each cup speak for itself. The result is an experience that feels effortless, warm, and worth returning to.

coffee.title: The Coffee
coffee.description: Thoughtfully sourced and seasonally rotating, our coffee highlights clarity, balance, and approachability. Each cup is crafted to feel as good as it tastes.

ingredients.title: The Ingredients
ingredients.description: We keep things simple and intentional—fresh milk, house-made elements, and flavors that complement rather than compete.

hospitality.title: The Space
hospitality.description: Designed for light, calm, and connection. Whether you’re here to work, meet, or pause, the space invites you to stay a little longer.

philosophy.label: THE FOUNDERS
philosophy.title: Built by hand,
philosophy.description:
Palm & Light began with a simple idea: to create a café that feels as good as it looks.

As longtime South Bay locals, we wanted to build a space that reflects how we like to spend our own mornings—good coffee, natural light, and room to slow down.

Every detail, from the menu to the materials, has been considered with care. Not to impress, but to create something that feels effortless, welcoming, and worth returning to.

menu.title: The Menu
menu.description: A curated selection of specialty coffee, Japanese-inspired signature lattes, and elevated toast. Prepared with precision and care.

mobileBar.title: Mobile Coffee Bar
mobileBar.description: Bring the Palm experience to your private events, weddings, and corporate gatherings.

community.title: The Community
community.description: Exclusive access to seasonal drops, early invites to cupping workshops, and neighborhood events.

giftCards.title: Gift Cards
giftCards.description: Give the gift of perfection. Redeemable in-store for beans, brew gear, or beverages.
